message:
fix(wal): detect and truncate corrupted WAL trailers on index load

Prevent future append failures by detecting and truncating WAL files with
trailing garbage from prior crashes. Propagate index field through scored
results in searcher and lexical modules. Add reproduction test for WAL
truncation scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1806,6 +1806,7 @@ fn fused_hits_to_scored_results(
                 doc_id: fh.doc_id.clone(),
                 score,
                 source,
+                index: fh.semantic_index,
                 fast_score: fh.semantic_score,
                 quality_score: None,
                 lexical_score: fh.lexical_score,
@@ -1867,6 +1868,7 @@ fn vector_hits_to_scored_results(
                 doc_id: h.doc_id.clone(),
                 score: h.score,
                 source: ScoreSource::SemanticFast,
+                index: Some(h.index),
                 fast_score: Some(h.score),
                 quality_score: None,
                 lexical_score: None,

@@ -603,6 +603,7 @@ impl LexicalSearch for TantivyIndex {
                     doc_id,
                     score: bm25_score,
                     source: ScoreSource::Lexical,
+                    index: None,
                     fast_score: None,
                     quality_score: None,
                     lexical_score: Some(bm25_score),
